programme.title: Enviado do Céu, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O pastor Randy Michaels é enviado para uma missão em uma pequena cidade rural do Arizona. Lá, ele e sua família precisam se adaptar à mudança de ares e aos costumes de sua nova vizinhança. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: O Diário de Tati, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. A adolescente Tati conta, de forma divertida, todos os problemas de sua juventude ao seu diário. Desde ficar em recuperação em matemática até os esforços para conseguir fisgar Zeca, sua paixão atual. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: North Hollywood, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Acabando a escola, um jovem precisa decidir entre o sonho de tornar-se skatista profissional ou ir para faculdade como seu pai deseja. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Muita Calma Nessa Hora, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. As amigas Mari, Tita e Aninha viajam para Búzios e, no caminho, conhecem Estrella, uma garota que pede carona para tentar achar seu pai. Juntas, as quatro garotas vivem situações engraçadas e emocionantes. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Fall Girls, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Paige Davis acaba de ser promovida a representante de vendas em seu trabalho. Depois de uma noite de festa, Paige e suas amigas acordam e encontram sua chefe morta. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Para Ser Sincero, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Sócios vão à falência com a crise que atinge negócios virtuais e são forçados a fazer o que mais temiam: um volta a morar com os pais e o outro, pai de família, tem que procurar um emprego de verdade. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Magal e os Formigas, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. João é um aposentado que está chateado com a vida. Viciado em loterias, ele nunca conseguiu ganhar dinheiro com isso. Um dia, porém, ele começa a receber visitas sobrenaturais do cantor Sidney Magal. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Uma Viagem para a Espanha, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Steve Coogan e Rob Brydon conhecem restaurantes e hotéis da costa espanhola, trocando piadas e impressões sobre seus almoços, conversando sobre paternidade, masculinidade e envelhecimento. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Tuff Turf - O Rebelde, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Prestes a terminar o ensino médio, Morgan é obrigado a mudar seu estilo de vida ao trocar de escola. Lá, ele acaba se envolvendo com a namorada do líder de uma gangue. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Life - Um Retrato de James Dean, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Em 1955, o fotógrafo Dennis Stock acompanha James Dean em uma viagem para a fazenda da família do ator. No local, Stock registra as imagens mais famosas de toda a carreira de Dean. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: A História de Esau, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Depois de anos ausente, escritor retorna à casa da família em Israel para cuidar do pai doente. Lá ele enfrenta seu irmão mais novo amargurado, que assumiu toda a responsabilidade pela padaria da família e se casou com a mulher a quem ambos amavam. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Apex, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Cinco caçadores pagam para caçar um homem em uma ilha deserta, e acabam se tornando a presa. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Enquanto Houver Esperança, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Angélica é uma adolescente de 16 anos que luta contra uma forma rara de câncer. E, enquanto seus pais batalham para custear seu tratamento e ganhar mais tempo de vida para a garota, ela se apaixona pela primeira vez. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: A História de Wim de A a Z, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Conheça a história do órfão Wim, um menino que quer muito ir à escola em vez de passar o tempo todo trabalhando forçadamente na fábrica da cidade. Com muita força de vontade, Wim consegue escapar e encontrar novos amigos. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: O Rei da Montanha, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Espen Ash Lad, filho de um pobre agricultor, embarca em uma missão perigosa com seus irmãos para salvar a princesa de um vilão conhecido como o Rei da Montanha. O objetivo é ganhar uma recompensa e salvar a fazenda da sua família da ruína. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Meu Querido Elfo, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Uma mãe solteira compra um apartamento antigo, sem saber que uma criatura mítica, um elfo, vive no apartamento há séculos. Os novos donos da casa precisam fazer amizade com a criatura, cuja tarefa é justamente proteger o local de uma bruxa. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: E Agora? A Mamãe Saiu de Férias!, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Giulia, mãe de três crianças elétricas, decide ir viajar sem a família por dez dias, e o caos da casa sobra para Carlo, marido e pai que vive apenas para o trabalho. Perdido e com um problema nas mãos, ele tem que se virar para dar conta. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Jungle - Protegendo a Selva, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Dipankar Nair gerencia santuário de elefantes ameaçado por caçadores de marfim. Seu filho Raj, veterinário de Mumbai, visita o local no aniversário da morte da mãe e se aproxima dos elefantes Bhola e Didi. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: A Química do Amor, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Uma dedicada cientista, determinada a resolver a guerra dos sexos, arrisca sua própria felicidade para provar que a ciência explica tudo. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: 1988. Toha Yamashi é discípulo e filho adotivo de Tetsuzan, representante do clã ninja Togakure. Para defender a localização de Pako, Toha deve enfrentar ninjas de todo o mundo e impedi-los de usar esse grande poder para o mal. programme.title: 2020. Naruto é escolhido para liderar Konohamaru, Moegi e Udon num treinamento de sobrevivência. O destino é o Grande Rosto de Pedra de Warudakumi no topo do Monte Takurami. Gêneros: Anime

programme.title: 2020. Naruto e o os outros ajudam Sazanami, que está ferido. Sazanami conta que ele tinha sido um ferreiro de espadas numa aldeia tranquila, mas foi incriminado por um assassinato realizado por Gosunkugi. Gêneros: Anime

programme.desc: Naruto: Caçar Ou Ser Caçado!?Decisão No Templo O.K..! - T01E160

programme.desc: Naruto: O Aparecimento De Estranhos Visitantes - T01E161

programme.title: 2020. O País dos Pássaros está com problemas devido a um espectro conhecido como o Guerreiro Amaldiçoado, que muitos acreditam ser o fantasma do Senhor Owashi, o antigo senhor feudal que morreu de repente. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: O Guerreiro Amaldiçoado - T01E162

programme.title: 2020. Moso, o conselheiro do falecido senhor feudal, e Komei, o estrategista chefe, estão em desacordo. Neji começa a achar que o Guerreiro Amaldiçoado faz parte de um plano… Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: O Plano Do Tático - T01E163

programme.title: 2020. Komei está controlando o Guerreiro Amaldiçoado. Moso impede as ambições de Komei. A equipe da Folha está incerta sobre os motivos dele. Neji não quer se envolver, mas Naruto se opõe. Gamakichi e Gamatatsu são escolhidos para investigar. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Tarde Demais Para Ajudar - T01E164

programme.title: 2020. Tenten e Neji, sem outra escolha, ouvem Kakashi. Ele sente que eles estão sendo perseguidos. Komei foi declarado um criminoso e condenado à morte. O Guerreiro Amaldiçoado aparece e captura Komei. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: A Morte De Naruto - T01E165

programme.title: 2020. Sagi jura punir Moso. Naruto se lembra de Sasuke quando vê Sagi. Nem palavras ou Naruto vão impedir que Sagi siga o caminho da vingança. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Quando O Tempo Para - T01E166

programme.title: 2020. Na mansão de Moso, uma batalha acontece entre os Ninjas Errantes e um ninja da Folha. Com a ajuda de Chishima, Naruto escapa do genjutsu de Moso. Moso revela ser o líder dos Ninjas Errantes, Hoki! Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Quando As Garças Batem As Asas
programme.desc: Naruto: Quando As Garças Batem As Asas - T01E167

programme.title: 2020. Choji e Naruto querem muito o ramen especial de Ichiraku, mas descobrem que o restaurante está fechado. Teuchi revela que sua filha foi sequestrada por Ryonin, o Chefe Ninja, que está atrás de suas receitas secretas. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Misture, Estique, Ferva! Cozinhe, Panela De Cobre, Cozinhe!
programme.desc: Naruto: Misture, Estique, Ferva! Cozinhe, Panela De Cobre, Cozinhe! - T01E168

programme.title: 2020. O Demônio do Oceano está lançando o caos no País do Mar. Anko lidera um time com Naruto, Ino e Shino. É revelado que Anko possui uma história inesperada no País do Mar. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Recordações : A Página Perdida - T01E169

programme.title: 2020. Incapaz de encontrar Naruto, Anko fala com os oficiais do País do Mar. O barco levando os fundos do governo que deviam proteger parte no dia seguinte! Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: A Porta Fechada - T01E170

programme.title: 2020. Assim que acordou, Anko começa a lembrar da Ilha do Demônio, um lugar que ela visitou uma vez com seu sensei, Orochimaru. Anko revela a verdade por trás dos desaparecimentos e do segredo sobre o corpo de Isaribi. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Infiltração : A Armadilha! - T01E171

programme.title: 2020. Amachi e sua gangue começam o ataque contra o navio do governo. Naruto e os outros escapam da Ilha do Demônio, mas o que eles encontram é a frota do País do Mar à beira da aniquilação. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Desespero : Um Coração Partido! - T01E172

programme.title: 2020. Os ninjas da Folha e Amachi se enfrentam no mar. Com a ajuda de Naruto, Amachi é derrotado, mas um monstro aparece. Naruto invoca Gamabunta para derrotá-lo. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Batalha No Mar : O Poder Liberado!
programme.desc: Naruto: Batalha No Mar : O Poder Liberado! - T01E173

programme.desc: Naruto: Impossível!Arte Ninja: Jutsu Estilo Dinheiro! - T01E174

programme.title: 2020. Agari Kaisen, um amigo de Tsunade, pede a Naruto, Kiba, e Hinata que procurem um tesouro escondido. Achando ser uma tarefa fácil por terem um mapa, Tsunade ameaça mandá-los de volta à Academia, se falharem. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: A Caça Ao Tesouro Começa! - T01E175

programme.title: 2020. Depois de escaparem da caverna, Naruto e os outros vão atrás da clã Kedouin para impedir seu plano, mas a Aldeia Oculta da Folha já está sendo atacada. Gêneros: Anime

programme.desc: Naruto: Corra! Esquive-Se Em Zigue-Zague! Caçar Ou Ser Caçado! - T01E176

programme.title: 2020. Naruto descobre que Jiraiya está aprontando algo. Jiraiya diz que está ocupado preparando seu manuscrito antes do prazo final. Naruto, impaciente e irritado, escreve seu próprio manuscrito para Jiraiya! Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Por Favor, Senhor Carteiro! - T01E177

programme.title: 2020. A Aldeia Oculta nas Estrelas pede à Aldeia Oculta da Folha para proteger uma estrela. A estrela, na verdade, é um meteorito que caiu 200 anos atrás, e dizem que ela possui poderes misteriosos. Gêneros: Anime

programme.desc: Naruto: Encontro! Um Menino Com Nome De Estrela - T01E178

programme.desc: Naruto: A Inesquecível Canção De Ninar - T01E179

programme.title: 2020. Akahoshi, o ninja mascarado que sequestrou Sumaru, pretende usar Sumaru para chamar o ninja misterioso que roubou a estrela. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Jutsu Oculto! O Preço Da Arte Ninja: Kujaku
programme.desc: Naruto: Jutsu Oculto! O Preço Da Arte Ninja: Kujaku - T01E180

programme.title: 2020. O ninja mascarado e Naruto caem nas profundezas do vale. Ao tratar as feridas de Naruto, o ninja mascarado conta o motivo de ter roubado a estrela. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Hoshikage : A Verdade Enterrada - T01E181

programme.title: 2020. O corpo de Natsuhi é afetado pelos efeitos da estrela. Ela controla a estrela e confronta Akahoshi desesperadamente, mas Sumaru é levado como refém. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Reunião : O Tempo Restante - T01E182

programme.title: 2020. Sumaru sente a morte da mãe e foge furioso. Naruto é incapaz de pará-lo. Para salvar Sumaru, Hokuto e Mizura arriscam suas vidas para revelar a verdade por trás do treinamento com a estrela. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: A Estrela Radiante - T01E183

programme.title: 2020. Akamaru é ferido por um shinobi rival de outra nação. O shinobi usou uma habilidade de luta que espalha bactéria pelo corpo do oponente, infectando as capacidades mentais da vítima. Isso faz com que Akamura entre numa fúria incontrolável. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: O Longo Dia De Kiba - T01E184

programme.desc: Naruto: A Lenda Da Aldeia Da Folha: O Onbaa! - T01E185

programme.desc: Naruto: O Risonho Shino - T01E186

programme.desc: Naruto: Aberto Para Negócios! O Serviço De Mudanças Da Folha - T01E187

programme.desc: Naruto: O Mistério Dos Mercadores Atingidos - T01E188

programme.title: 2020. Naruto e os outros são atacados por Ruiga, o primeiro ninja maligno, que consegue tirar água da terra para usar como armas. Naruto logo descobre um jeito de ter a vantagem na batalha. Gêneros: Anime

programme.desc: Naruto: Um Ilimitado Abastecimento De Ferramentas Ninja! - T01E189

programme.desc: Naruto: A Misteriosa Maldição Do Castelo Mal-Assombrado - T01E194

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: O Segredo Da Batalha - T01E44

Guy enfrenta dificuldades contra Kisame, mas o derrota com um poderoso jutsu. Os ninjas da folha conseguem derrotar seu arquiminigo. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: As Consequências Da Traição - T01E45
programme.desc: 2008. Kisame e Itachi parecem ter sido clones cujos poderes foram copiados por um jutsu de personificação. Vovó Chiyo explica a conexão entre a besta de cauda e o jinchuriki. Sakura percebe que Naruto enfrenta o mesmo destino e lágrimas escorrem em seu rosto. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: A Página Inacabada - T01E46
programme.desc: 2008. As equipes Kakashi e Guy fazem uma pausa. Quando a perseguição recomeça, Kakashi explica a Chiyo que Naruto também é um jinchuriki. Chiyo lamenta ter sido ela que selou o shukaku dentro de Gaara... Gaara é engolfado por uma luz branca. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: 2023. Para encarar o Mago Negro de Arkana, Yugi tira um coelho da cartola: a Pequena Maga Negra! É a batalha dos sexos, para determinar o verdadeiro mestre dos magos! Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima

programme.title: 2009. O técnico Hitomiko decide remover Endou como goleiro e pede que ele se torne um libero. Depois disso, Aphrodi se tornará um atacante e Tachimukai se tornará o novo goleiro de Raimon. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama

programme.desc: Dancing/composing twin sisters (Catherine Deneuve, Françoise Dorleac) find romance in Paris, one with a sailor, the other with a U.S. pianist (Jacques Perrin). Starring Catherine Deneuve, Françoise Dorleac, Jacques Perrin.

programme.title: The Swan
programme.desc: A European princess (Grace Kelly) waltzes with her tutor (Louis Jourdan) but is destined to marry a crown prince (Alec Guinness). Starring Grace Kelly, Alec Guinness, Louis Jourdan.

programme.title: Oklahoma!
programme.desc: Cowboy Curly (Gordon MacRae) loves Laurey (Shirley Jones) despite hired hand Jud Fry (Rod Steiger). Rodgers and Hammerstein songs include Oh What a Beautiful Mornin. Starring Gordon MacRae, Shirley Jones, Rod Steiger.

programme.title: The Secret Garden
programme.desc: An English orphan (Margaret OBrien) finds the key to her bitter uncles (Herbert Marshall) magic garden, seen in color. Starring Margaret OBrien, Herbert Marshall, Dean Stockwell.

programme.title: Picnic at Hanging Rock
programme.desc: In turn-of-the-century Australia, three young schoolgirls wander away from a school picnic and become lost in the bush. Starring Rachel Roberts, Dominic Guard, Helen Morse.

programme.title: The Roman Spring of Mrs. Stone
programme.desc: An aging actress, upset by suggestions that she is too old for her role in a play, travels to Rome, where she begins a steamy affair with a young Italian gigolo. Starring Vivien Leigh, Warren Beatty, Lotte Lenya.

programme.title: One Way Passage
programme.desc: A condemned man (William Powell) and dying woman (Kay Francis) fall in love on a ship from Hong Kong to San Francisco. Starring William Powell, Kay Francis, Frank McHugh.

programme.title: Confession
programme.desc: A cabaret singer (Kay Francis) stands trial in Warsaw for killing a concert pianist (Basil Rathbone) to save her daughters honor. Starring Kay Francis, Basil Rathbone, Ian Hunter.

programme.title: Give Me Your Heart
programme.desc: An American lawyers (George Brent) wife (Kay Francis) is reunited with her child and his father, an English nobleman (Patric Knowles). Starring Kay Francis, George Brent, Patric Knowles.

programme.title: Man Wanted
programme.desc: A businesswoman (Kay Francis) makes a salesman (David Manners) her secretary and has him take dictation. Starring Kay Francis, David Manners, Andy Devine.

programme.title: My Bill
programme.desc: A boy (Dickie Moore) brings good fortune to his widowed mother (Kay Francis), abandoned by her three other children. Starring Kay Francis, Dickie Moore, Bonita Granville.

programme.title: The Keyhole
programme.desc: A private eye (George Brent) follows a millionaires wife (Kay Francis) to Havana, where they fall in love. Starring Kay Francis, George Brent, Glenda Farrell.

programme.title: The House on 56th Street
programme.desc: A woman (Kay Francis) loves a rich man (Gene Raymond), spends 20 years in prison, then teams up with a Roaring 20s card shark (Ricardo Cortez). Starring Kay Francis, Ricardo Cortez, Gene Raymond.

programme.title: The Amazing Dr. Clitterhouse
programme.desc: A criminologist (Edward G. Robinson) joins a hoodlums (Humphrey Bogart) gang, becomes its mastermind and stands trial for murder. Starring Edward G. Robinson, Claire Trevor, Humphrey Bogart.

programme.title: Valley of the Giants
programme.desc: A lumberman (Wayne Morris) and a gambling-house woman (Claire Trevor) thwart Easterners eyeing the California redwoods. Starring Wayne Morris, Claire Trevor, Frank McHugh.

programme.title: Best of the Badmen
programme.desc: A Union officer (Robert Ryan) joins the outlaw James and Younger brothers against a bounty hunter (Robert Preston). Starring Robert Ryan, Claire Trevor, Robert Preston.

programme.title: Borderline
programme.desc: A federal agent (Fred MacMurray) and a policewoman (Claire Trevor) track a Mexican drug ring, each unaware the other is undercover. Starring Fred MacMurray, Claire Trevor, Raymond Burr.

programme.title: Born to Kill
programme.desc: A private eye (Walter Slezak) hunts a killer (Lawrence Tierney) who marries a divorcees (Claire Trevor) rich sister. Starring Lawrence Tierney, Claire Trevor, Walter Slezak.

programme.title: Murder, My Sweet
programme.desc: The search for a missing person plunges detective Philip Marlowe into a deadly web of blackmail and murder. Starring Dick Powell, Claire Trevor, Anne Shirley.

programme.title: Key Largo
programme.desc: A gangster (Edward G. Robinson) holds a GI (Humphrey Bogart) and others hostage in a run-down Florida Keys hotel. Starring Humphrey Bogart, Edward G. Robinson, Lauren Bacall.

programme.title: Stagecoach
programme.desc: An outlaw (John Wayne), a prostitute (Claire Trevor), a drunken doctor and assorted others go through Indian country. Starring John Wayne, Claire Trevor, Andy Devine.

programme.title: South Pacific
programme.desc: Navy nurse Nellie (Mitzi Gaynor) falls for plantation-owner Emile (Rossano Brazzi), who accepts a top-secret World War II mission. Starring Mitzi Gaynor, Rossano Brazzi, John Kerr.

programme.title: Fanny
programme.desc: In Marseille a young woman (Leslie Caron) remeets Marius, the father of her child, when her aged husband (Maurice Chevalier) is dying. Starring Leslie Caron, Maurice Chevalier, Charles Boyer.

programme.title: Camelot
programme.desc: King Arthur (Richard Harris) loses Guinevere (Vanessa Redgrave) to trusted Sir Lancelot (Franco Nero) in the colorful court of Camelot. Starring Richard Harris, Vanessa Redgrave, Franco Nero.

programme.title: Tall Story
programme.desc: Gamblers, a coed (Jane Fonda) and an ethics exam force answers from a college basketball player (Anthony Perkins). Starring Anthony Perkins, Jane Fonda, Ray Walston.

programme.desc: Jason Priestley takes a look at Harold Ballard, the controversial owner of the Toronto Maple Leafs. Ballards offensive behaviors range from backhanded contract dealings and sexist tirades, to serving a year in prison for theft and fraud.

programme.desc: A writer befriends a retired serial killer in a desperate attempt to find inspiration for his next novel and save his marriage. Covering as his marriage counselor, the killer teaches him his methods as reality becomes deadlier than fiction. Starring Steve Buscemi, John Magaro, Britt Lower.

programme.title: Troppo
programme.desc: Ted and Amanda save Raphs life and solve Julians murder, only to be faced with rescuing Teds family from a predator who has had Ted in his crosshairs for years.

programme.title: Psycho Therapy: The Shallow Tale of a Writer Who Decided to Write About a Serial Killer
programme.desc: A writer befriends a retired serial killer in a desperate attempt to find inspiration for his next novel and save his marriage. Covering as his marriage counselor, the killer teaches him his methods as reality becomes deadlier than fiction. Starring Steve Buscemi, John Magaro, Britt Lower.

programme.title: Mary J. Bliges Family Affair
programme.desc: Tensions rise between Kendra and Ben as they move out of the city and struggle with fertility issues. Their relationship reaches a boiling point when Ben secretly helps his brother, while Kendra returns to the city and reunites with an old friend. Starring Ajiona Alexus, DaVinchi, Princess Davis.

programme.title: Trapped in the Spotlight
programme.desc: A psychotic music producer kidnaps a cancelled RandB singer and her former co-star 15 years after they broke up. With their lives and legacies on the line, the estranged duo must face the demons from their past to make it out alive. Starring Monique Coleman, Melyssa Ford, Emmanuel Kabongo.

programme.title: Cruise Ship Killers
programme.desc: A retired teacher takes a solo Great Lakes cruise toward a family reunion; but when she doesnt check in with her family members back home, her loved ones begins to suspect something bad has befallen her.

programme.title: Cruise Ship Killers
programme.desc: A German college student working aboard on a cruise ship goes missing at an Alaskan port; did she decide to skip out on her duties or did a terrible fate await her on-shore?

programme.title: Finally Caught
programme.desc: The murder of Afrikka Hardy in 2014 turns out to be a catalyst for the investigation that ultimately exposes the crimes committed by Darren Deon Vann.

programme.title: Finally Caught
programme.desc: On August 26, 2011, Amanda Plasse becomes the victim of a brutal murder; it takes years before the culprit gets arrested and her mother also fights to pass a law that prevents unauthorized sharing of crime scene photos.

programme.title: Fatal Fixer-Upper
programme.desc: A couple couldnt be happier after buying their dream home from a mysterious man named Josh. However, their newfound paradise turns into a living nightmare as Josh seems unwilling to let the house go. Starring Jasmine Aivaliotis, Philip McElroy, Duke Van Patten.

programme.title: Finally Caught
programme.desc: A devoted mother vanishes on Thanksgiving Day, leaving behind a mystery that stuns a small Colorado town. As investigators dig into her disappearance, they uncover a chilling plot fueled by deception, betrayal, and a desperate fight for control.

programme.title: Aliens Abducted My Parents and Now I Feel Kinda Left Out
programme.desc: High school journalist Itsy befriends her space-obsessed neighbor Calvin. After he convinces her that his parents were abducted by aliens, together they concoct a plan to get them back. Starring Emma Tremblay, Jacob Buster, Will Forte.

programme.title: A Killer Behind Closed Doors

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Go Bernie, Its Your Birthday

programme.title: The Harlem Globetrotters: Secrets of the City - Stuttgart; Sydney
programme.desc: In Stuttgart, Germany, join the spring festival in traditional German attire and connect with the local Black expat community; Bulldog and Wham travel to Sydney, Australia, where they dive into the world of traditional Aussie sports.

programme.title: The Harlem Globetrotters: Secrets of the City - Mexico City
programme.desc: Join the Harlem Globetrotters on a whirlwind adventure through Mexico City! They dive into ancient tales by gliding along historic canals and soaring over majestic pyramids. Next, they feast like royals in a one-of-a-kind cave restaurant.

programme.title: Urban Indie Film Block - As it Happens...
programme.desc: Whether the moment demands it or youre intentionally focused, be present.

programme.title: Style Kings - 3 Ships: Friendship, Mentorship And Entrepreneurship
programme.desc: Dedrick hosts a graduation ceremony for a group of entrepreneurship students at Morehouse College to the Hideoki studio where special guest, Danny Glover, joins for a conversation about the moments that matter.

programme.title: Style Kings - Revitalization
programme.desc: Justin begins a new project with homeowner, Rashad, who plans to bring a fixer-upper home on a lakeview property to life; Dedrick gets creative with collaboration partner D.L. Warfield on how to evolve the golf space.

programme.title: Style Kings - Its All in the Details
programme.desc: Dedrick goes to luxury factories in Italy to bring the PING x Hideoki collection to fruition and reveals the fine craftsmanship of the PING x Hideoki collection; Justin dives into the details of selecting finishes for Rashads kitchen and bathrooms.

programme.title: Style Kings - Foundations
programme.desc: Justin gets a surprise visit from his mom on the job,getting to know where Justins expertise began. Dedrick gives a lesson on the foundations of our careers and the ultimate bedrock: confidence.

programme.title: Life of a King
programme.desc: Determined to help at-risk youths avoid the mistakes he made, an ex-con (Cuba Gooding Jr.) forms a chess club to offer them an alternative to running with street gangs.

programme.title: Really Love
programme.desc: A rising Black painter tries to break into the competitive art world while balancing an unexpected romance with an ambitious law student.

programme.title: Family Time - Cheer Up
programme.desc: Lisa coaches Ebonys cheerleading team while Tony and Donnie deal with a mouse in the house.

programme.title: Family Time - Cold Feet
programme.desc: Tony and Lisa get caught in a lie.

programme.title: Family Time - Love Tat
programme.desc: Tony and Lisa struggle to find the perfect anniversary gift for each other.

programme.title: Family Time - College Bound
programme.desc: Devin gets in to college but doesnt want to go; Lisas friend comes for a visit.

programme.title: Family Time - Secret Stallworth
programme.desc: Finding the perfect Secret Santa gift proves harder than either Tony or Lisa expected.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Being Bernie Mac
programme.desc: Bernie must baby-sit for Bryana and deal with Jordan, who was sent home from school for pulling a fire alarm unnecessarily.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Mac Overdrive
programme.desc: Bernie has no patience when trying to teach Vanessa to drive.

programme.desc: Bernie realizes Bryana and Jordan are too old to share a room, so he moves her in with Vanessa, who is less than thrilled.

programme.desc: Bernies sister, Benita, announces her plans to elope in Las Vegas; Wanda offers her the Mac residence as a wedding site.

programme.desc: Bryanas standardized test scores prompt Bernie to send her to Jordans school, but she is so far behind that they threaten to move her back a grade.

programme.desc: A sexist school board member ignores Reginas funding proposal while green-lighting Steves harebrained ideas.

programme.desc: Yo-Yo lays out small bites that are packed with flavor; the menu is stuffed portobello mushrooms, BLT skewers with scallops and pesto, and the cocktail of the day is a blood orange Margarita.

programme.title: Downright Delicious With Yo-Yo - Simple and Delicious
programme.desc: Yo-Yo kicks things off with a penne pasta with spicy Italian sausage and a garlic tomato sauce; she shows off her skills with her version of fried rice, complete with eggs shrimp and more.

programme.desc: In the blue water waves of Mafia Island, Tanzania, a love story begins; Malick and Dodoma are dedicated islanders who believe true love is a gift.

programme.desc: When Jordan develops a crush on a girl at school, Bernie takes it upon himself to teach Jordan how to be a player and get the girl.

programme.desc: Jordans prank anonymous phone calls have surprising consequences.

programme.title: Breakdown (1997)
programme.desc: A mans (Kurt Russell) wife (Kathleen Quinlan) disappears in the desert Southwest after accepting a truckers (J.T. Walsh) help with car trouble.

programme.title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day (1991)
programme.desc: Two cyborgs from the future battle over the life of a teen (Edward Furlong) who will someday lead humanity against the machines.

programme.title: Deep Impact (1998)
programme.desc: As a comet is on a collision course with earth, humans have to prepare for their survival. They randomly select eight hundred thousand people to be saved in order to keep the human race alive.

programme.title: Along Came a Spider (2001)
programme.desc: A detective (Morgan Freeman) and a Secret Service agent (Monica Potter) investigate the abduction of a senators daughter from a school.

programme.title: Frank Millers Sin City (2005)
programme.desc: Lawmen, prostitutes (Devon Aoki, Alexis Bledel), a hulking thug and other sordid characters run amok in a crime-ridden metropolis.

programme.title: Maniac (2012)
programme.desc: A serial killer (Elijah Wood) removes his victims scalps and attaches them to the vintage mannequins he restores in his late mothers shop.

programme.title: Wrong Turn (2021)
programme.desc: Despite warnings to stick to the Appalachian Trail, hikers stray off course and cross into land inhabited by a hidden community of mountain dwellers who use deadly means to protect their way of life.

programme.title: Paranormal Activity 2 (2010)
programme.desc: After experiencing what they think are break-ins, a family realizes that the events unfolding before them are more sinister than they seem.

programme.title: Paranormal Activity 3 (2011)
programme.desc: A videographer becomes obsessed with finding the source of disturbing late-night noises in his home and discovers its terrifying origin.

programme.title: Hard Rain (1998)
programme.desc: A thief (Morgan Freeman), a sheriff (Randy Quaid) and the nephew (Christian Slater) of an armored-truck driver seek money bags in a flooding Indiana town.

programme.title: Undisputed III: Redemption (2010)
programme.desc: Uri Boyka is an inmate trapped in the toughest prison in the world. He is ready to make his comeback in a lethal boxing competition for a shot at freedom.

programme.title: The Honey Trap: A True Story of Love, Lies and the FBI
programme.desc: The story of Denis Cuspert, aka Deso Dogg, and his journey from infamous German rapper to ISIS recruiter; exploring the circular relationship between propaganda, recruitment and the soft power of entertainment culture.

programme.title: The Core (2003)
programme.desc: In order to save mankind, scientists and astronauts must set off a nuclear device at the center of the Earth.

programme.title: Gangs of New York (2002)
programme.desc: During the era of Tammany Halls sway, a young man (Leonardo DiCaprio) vows vengeance on the vicious gangster (Daniel Day-Lewis) who killed his father.

programme.title: Shakespeare in Love (1998)
programme.desc: Young William Shakespeare (Joseph Fiennes) falls for Viola (Gwyneth Paltrow), reawakening his creativity, but she is betrothed to Wessex.

programme.title: The Queen (2006)
programme.desc: Queen Elizabeth II and Prime Minister Tony Blair try to reach a compromise in determining the royal familys public reaction to Princess Dianas death.

programme.title: Restoration (1995)
programme.desc: A hedonistic physician (Robert Downey Jr.) weds the kings (Sam Neill) lover but is not allowed to consummate the marriage in 17th-century England.

programme.title: The Reader (2008)
programme.desc: In postwar Germany, a teenager (David Kross) has a love affair with an older woman (Kate Winslet) who is hiding a terrible secret.

programme.title: The Hours (2002)
programme.desc: The writings of Virginia Woolf (Nicole Kidman) affect a housewife (Julianne Moore) and emulate the life of a New Yorker (Meryl Streep) who is in love with a dying poet.

programme.title: Pretty in Pink (1986)
programme.desc: A rich teen asks an unpopular student to the senior prom, creating problems among their separate circles of friends.

programme.title: Florence Foster Jenkins (2016)
programme.desc: In 1940s New York, a man (Hugh Grant) goes to extreme lengths to make sure his wife (Meryl Streep) never finds out that shes an awful opera singer.

programme.title: Bridget Joness Diary (2001)
programme.desc: An outrageous British woman (Renee Zellweger) decides to take control of her life, but instead falls for two very different men (Colin Firth, Hugh Grant).

programme.title: Bridget Jones: The Edge of Reason (2004)
programme.sub-title: Bridget Jones: The Edge of Reason (2004)
programme.desc: An attractive lawyer and Bridgets (Renee Zellweger) former boss (Hugh Grant) threaten her newfound happiness with Mark Darcy (Colin Firth).

programme.title: Beautiful Girls (1996)
programme.desc: The opposite sex preoccupies working-class pals gathered for their high-school reunion in small-town Massachusetts.

programme.title: The English Patient (1996)
programme.desc: A Hungarian counts (Ralph Fiennes) fling with a British newlywed leads to tragedy in World War II North Africa.

programme.title: Mollys Game (2017)
programme.desc: Molly Bloom runs the worlds most exclusive high-stakes poker game for a decade before being arrested by the FBI. Her only ally is defense lawyer Charlie Jaffey, who learns that there is much more to Molly than the tabloids lead people to believe.

programme.title: Yes, Madam (1985)
programme.desc: A relentless inspector (Michelle Yeoh) and a Scotland Yard detective (Cynthia Rothrock) investigate murder linked to microfilm.

programme.title: Lara Croft: Tomb Raider (2001)
programme.desc: A beautiful globe-trotter (Angelina Jolie) battles otherworldly creatures for possession of a powerful artifact.

programme.title: Lara Croft Tomb Raider: The Cradle of Life (2003)
programme.sub-title: Lara Croft Tomb Raider: The Cradle of Life (2003)
programme.desc: A globe-trotter (Angelina Jolie) must find Pandoras box before a maniacal scientist (Ciarán Hinds) can harness its power for world domination.

programme.title: Sound of Violence (2021)
programme.desc: A young killer experiences intense pleasure whenever she hears the sound of human pain.

programme.title: Asking for It (2022)
programme.desc: A victim of sexual assault joins an all-female gang that targets violent frat boys and a corrupt police force of human traffickers.

programme.title: Mollys Game (2017)
programme.desc: Molly Bloom runs the worlds most exclusive high-stakes poker game for a decade before being arrested by the FBI. Her only ally is defense lawyer Charlie Jaffey, who learns that there is much more to Molly than the tabloids lead people to believe.

programme.title: Jennys Wedding (2015)
programme.desc: When Jenny (Katherine Heigl) decides to marry a woman (Alexis Bledel), her conventional family must accept who she is or risk losing her forever.

programme.title: Spotlights: A Showtime Short Film Series
programme.desc: A collection of short films showcasing different themes.

programme.title: Shall We Dance? (2004)
programme.desc: A married Chicago attorney (Richard Gere) takes dancing lessons with a beautiful woman (Jennifer Lopez) he saw through a window.

programme.title: The Prize Winner of Defiance, Ohio (2005)
programme.sub-title: The Prize Winner of Defiance, Ohio (2005)
programme.desc: A 50s-era housewife (Julianne Moore) uses her wit and winnings from commercial jingle contests to help support her large family.

programme.title: Queen Bees (2021)
programme.desc: While her house undergoes repairs, fiercely independent senior Helen temporarily moves into a nearby retirement community, where she encounters lusty widows, cutthroat bridge tournaments and a hotbed of bullying "mean girls."

programme.title: Guns Up (2025)
programme.desc: After a job goes horribly wrong, a man who moonlights as a mob henchman has one night to get his family out of the city while keeping his dark secret hidden.

programme.title: Scream 3 (2000)
programme.desc: Murders draw a young woman (Neve Campbell), a reporter (Courteney Cox Arquette) and an ex-policeman (David Arquette) to the set of a movie inspired by horrific events that they survived.

programme.title: Scream 4 (2011)
programme.desc: The Ghostface Killer returns with a vengeance when self-help author Sidney Prescott arrives in Woodsboro on the last stop of her book tour.

programme.title: Monstrous (2022)
programme.desc: A terrifying new horror awaits Laura and her 7-year-old son, Cody, when they flee her abusive ex-husband and try to settle into a new life. Still traumatized, their fragile existence is pushed to the breaking point.

programme.title: The Woman in Black (2012)
programme.desc: A widowed lawyer (Daniel Radcliffe) encounters ghostly goings-on at the foreboding estate of a recently deceased client.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction (1987)
programme.desc: A New York lawyer (Michael Douglas) with a wife (Anne Archer) and daughter sleeps with a client (Glenn Close) whose lust turns to hate.

programme.title: Case 39 (2009)
programme.desc: A social worker (Renee Zellweger) saves a girl (Jodelle Ferland) from abusive parents but finds there is more to the child than meets the eye.

programme.title: Atlantic City (1980)
programme.desc: A boardwalk numbers runner (Burt Lancaster) feels young again with a casino clam shucker (Susan Sarandon) and a lucky cocaine deal.

programme.title: Guns Up (2025)
programme.desc: After a job goes horribly wrong, a man who moonlights as a mob henchman has one night to get his family out of the city while keeping his dark secret hidden.

programme.title: Jersey Girl (2004)
programme.desc: A young woman (Liv Tyler) changes the life of a single father (Ben Affleck) who used to be a successful New York music publicist.

programme.title: Superstar (1999)
programme.desc: An energetic schoolgirl (Molly Shannon) hopes to win a talent contest where a prize as a movie extra might lead to her first kiss.

programme.title: View From the Top (2003)
programme.desc: A woman (Gwyneth Paltrow) from a small Nevada town makes friends while training to become a flight attendant.

programme.title: Muriels Wedding (1994)
programme.desc: An Australian social outcast (Toni Collette) moves to Sydney, cares for an ailing friend (Rachel Griffiths) and weds an Olympian needing citizen status.

programme.title: Spotlights: A Showtime Short Film Series
programme.desc: A collection of short films showcasing different themes.

programme.title: Hes Just Not That Into You (2009)
programme.sub-title: Hes Just Not That Into You (2009)
programme.desc: Friends and lovers try to navigate their way through the complexities of modern relationships, sometimes misconstruing the true intentions of the opposite sex.

programme.title: The Beldham (2024)
programme.desc: A struggling new mother fights a generations-old presence lurking within her familys home, threatening her safety, her sanity, and the life of her infant child.

programme.title: Cursed (2005)
programme.desc: Siblings (Christina Ricci, Jesse Eisenberg) hunt for the werewolf that attacked them and transformed them into lycanthropes.

programme.title: Run (2025)
programme.desc: Smugglers, the police, locals and tourists get drawn into a dangerous web of survival, sacrifice and shifting loyalties as Europe faces a surge in migration.

programme.title: Wild Fly
programme.desc: Few wilderness destinations compare to the mighty Zambezi, where ferocious tigerfish are found in crocodile infested waters. The Wildfly Team experience an incredible journey in amongst Africas wildlife.

programme.title: Wild Fish Masterclass With Mike Robinson
programme.desc: Mike and Chef James cook their version of a rich Spanish Basque style stew.

programme.title: Hooked on Africa
programme.desc: The unspoilt wilderness of South Africas Eastern Cape coastline takes you back to when time was measured by the tides and little else mattered, except the lure of the myriad species to be found off the rocks and in the abundant estuaries.

programme.title: Inside Angling
programme.desc: The upper section of the Zambezi River, while difficult to get to, never fails to deliver a fantastic fishing experience. We go in search of Africas Piranha and come face to face with the business end of this freshwater monster.
